T0242.title: Reverse Scam
T0242.definition: A deceptive scheme that uses fake rewards as bait to trick participants into losing their own money.
T0242.description: Fraudsters often post fabricated 'money-making' tutorials or promotional links in social groups and forums, enticing victims to invest their own principal or pay a commission first. Victims believe they will receive high returns, but their money is stolen by the fraudsters, a practice commonly known as 'reverse scalping.' This tactic exploits information asymmetry and greed, serving as a funnel for attracting and defrauding victims within the marketing fraud chain.
T0242.usageExample: Someone posted a 'deposit 50, get 100 back' link in the group, but I was blocked right after sending the money—a classic dynamite fishing scam.
